title: Vistra (VST) Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenue Lag
text: Vistra's (VST) second-quarter earnings are better than expected. The company continues to buy back shares, increasing shareholders' value.

title: Vistra Corp. (VST) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Vistra Corp. (VST) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 770.59% and 38.39%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Vistra (VST) Set to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Vistra's (VST) second-quarter earnings are expected to have benefited from customer additions in Texas and a more than 10% drop in outstanding shares.
